unique_vulnerabilities.name: Reentrancy in withdraw()
unique_vulnerabilities.reasoning: These findings describe a reentrancy vulnerability involving an external call on line 19 and subsequent state access on line 20. Both tools (Slither and Mythril) agree on the issue.

unique_vulnerabilities.name: Unchecked return value in withdraw()
unique_vulnerabilities.reasoning: This finding highlights an unchecked return value from an external call, which is distinct from the reentrancy issue.

unique_vulnerabilities.name: Unprotected Ether withdrawal in withdraw()
unique_vulnerabilities.reasoning: This finding describes a lack of access control, allowing arbitrary users to withdraw Ether, which is separate from the reentrancy and unchecked return issues.

unique_vulnerabilities.name: Outdated Solidity version
unique_vulnerabilities.reasoning: These findings both describe the use of an outdated Solidity version with known issues.
